bird.name: Handsome sunbird
bird.summary: The handsome sunbird (Aethopyga bella) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is endemic to the Philippines.

locations.name: 巴納豪火山
locations.summary: 巴納豪火山是菲律賓的火山，位於呂宋島南部，海拔高度2,170米，山體由安山岩組成，火山口長3.5公里、寬1.5公里，最近一次火山噴發在1843年發生。 外部連結 Philippine Institute of Volcanology an…

locations.name: Mount Kitanglad
locations.summary: Mount Kitanglad is an inactive volcano located in the Kitanglad Mountain Range in Bukidnon province on Mindanao island.
